name: PaymentOptions
usage_hint: Buy-now-pay-later badge showing installment pricing for Klarna, Afterpay, Shop Pay, Affirm, Zip. Auto-calculates per-installment amount.
when_to_use: On product pages to show financing options. Listens for variant:changed events to update pricing. Three variants: inline (text + icons), expandable (click to show providers), icons_only (logo row).
when_not_to_use: When BNPL providers aren't enabled in your store. For subscription pricing use SubscriptionToggle. When product price is below provider minimums (usually $35-50).
anti_patterns: Listing providers that aren't actually enabled at checkout (misleading, causes cart abandonment)
Using inline variant with >3 providers (too crowded — use expandable)
Setting installments to anything other than 4 (most BNPL = 4 equal payments)

examples.label: Expandable with auto-update from variant changes
